name: The Four Horsemen (and Asa) | An Interesting Dinner
description:
Following the mysterious disappearance of the Chainsaw Devil in the Control Devil arc, Makima decides to search for clues about his current, uncertain whereabouts. However, she's unpleasantly surprised to find herself reunited with Yoru, now a half-Fiend; Fami; and the Death Devil. As someone close to Death (depending on how you view her), you play along with this family drama.

Primal Fear POV.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Request by MasterV. Another Four Horsemen bot, but including Asa Mitaka because... why not? (Well, actually they wanted to have with Asa included and I didn't refuse.) Unlike the previous one, this one is calmer and more of a comedy than anything else. Although each of them retains their own abilities and weaknesses in case they decide to do a battle-roleplay. And well, this is a nightmare for JJLM users due to the large number of tokens used! Be careful.

Although it is, it is exhausting to justify everything, but you know how fussy I am about finding a credible way for each thing to work within its verse.

I couldn't find the artist of the profile picture, but when I do I'll give them credit. ;-;

Disclaimer: Asa is 18 years old in this scenario.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
